AdditionalAttributes.description:
Since 1979, Penotti has been one of the world's largest sweet spread companies, dedicated to developing the best tasting spreads. The name Penotti comes from “nocciole”, Italian for hazelnut!


  • Bite into Belgium's favourite biscuit! Cookie Penotti is a delicious creamy Speculoos biscuit spread made with the original Belgian caramelised butter cookies. The ultimate taste sensation!
  • Ultra-smooth and super-spreadable, Cookie Penotti Original is the perfect pairing for all your sweet snacking moments:
    • Spread Penotti as a topping on bread, pancakes and donuts
    • Scoop Penotti onto your ice cream or breakfast bowl and into sweet recipes
    • Spoon it from the jar - Penotti makes it ok to be a little pen-naughty!
  • No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives.
  • GMO-free, nut-free, and vegan-friendly.
  • We're for delicious, but we're also for the planet using RSPO certified palm oil.
    • Plus, our funky glass jars make great vases, breakfast containers, lolly jars and pen cups to make recycling easy. Amazing!
  • Don't want to just eat Penotti from the jar? Find recipe inspiration at www.penotti.com or on our socials @penottianz.
  • Store in a cool, dry place.

Mutti Polpa Finely Chopped Tomatoes - 100% Italian tomatoes from certified production.

Only Italian tomatoes: red, sweet, ripe and free of yellow and green parts. That's why Mutti Finely Chopped Tomatoes are different from the first glance: thick, inviting and fragrant. The pleasure continues with the first taste: all the delicate flavor of fresh tomatoes.

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after tomatoes arrive at the plant.


99.8% ripe tomatoes and a pinch of salt
Picked and packed in 24 hours for maximum freshness
